sentences.arabic: وَصَلَتْ رَسَالَةٌ جَدِيدَةٌ إِلَى بَرِيدِ هَبَةَ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Stigla je nova poruka u Hebin elektronski sandučić.
sentences.translationEn: A new message arrived in Heba's email inbox.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الرِّسَالَةُ مِنْ زَبُونٍ يَسْأَلُ عَنْ مَوْعِدٍ.
sentences.translation: Poruka je bila od klijenta koji pita o terminu.
sentences.translationEn: The message was from a client asking about an appointment.

sentences.arabic: رَدَّتْ هَبَةُ بِسُرْعَةٍ وَحَدَّدَتْ مَوْعِدًا مُنَاسِبًا.
sentences.translation: Heba je brzo odgovorila i odredila odgovarajući termin.
sentences.translationEn: Heba replied quickly and set a suitable appointment.

sentences.translation: Klijent joj je zahvalio na brzom odgovoru.
sentences.translationEn: The client thanked her for the quick reply.
